rationale: The citing paper uses Hollenbeck (2018) mainly as background evidence that online review-based reputation has become more important relative to brand-based reputation. It also appears in a grouped list of prior marketing studies using text analysis approaches, without a distinct role tied to the paper's own model, hypotheses, or estimation strategy. There is no clear sign that the citing study builds directly on, refines, or tests Hollenbeck's specific chain-affiliation findings.
